name: Susie | Your date gets bullied
description:
You asked out the weird girl, and too attempt to help her get out more you bring her to a party. Protect her! She's weird and sweet!

I don't want to see any comments about "She's not goth", I don't care, don't gate keep! But I do wanna hear which warframe you'd bang. For me, Nova.
creator: Pepperfighter
